changes: Added 'submitted' and 'posted' status to allowed statuses for receiving
Status validation now includes: submitted, ordered, partial, posted
Updated status filter to include: submitted, ordered, partial, posted
Added status badges for ordered, posted, received statuses

partial_receipt_logic.description: System supports partial receipt with remaining qty tracking
steps: User enters receive_now quantity (0 to pending_qty)
Stock movement created for actual received quantity only
